zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London是Sir Thomas Browne的兒子，於1435年出生在英國盧特藍德。他於1459年與Alice Jane de Swineshed在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯文黑阿德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1480年在英國倫敦被列為lord mayor of london。他去世於1498年1月1日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年63歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London是Sir Thomas Browne的儿子，于1435年出生在英国盧特藍德。他于1459年与Alice Jane de Swineshed在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯文黑阿德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1480年在英国倫敦被列为lord mayor of london。他去世于1498年1月1日在英国英格兰倫敦享年63岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London was born in 1435, in Rutland, England as the son of Sir Thomas Browne. He married Alice Jane de Swineshed in 1459, in Swineshead, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1480, his occupation is listed as lord mayor of london in London, England. He died on 1 January 1498, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.Walcott, Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England: Walcot near Billinghay, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London est né en 1435, à Rutland, Angleterre, fils de Sir Thomas Browne. Il a épousé Alice Jane de Swineshed en 1459, à Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1480, sa profession de son indiquée est lord mayor of london à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1498, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Walcott, Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England: Walcot near Billinghay, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London wurde 1435 in Rutland, England, als Sohn von Sir Thomas Browne geboren. Er hat 1459 in Swineshead, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Jane de Swineshed geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1480 ist sein Beruf als lord mayor of london in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Januar 1498 im Alter von 63 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London è nato il nel 1435 nel Rutland, England come figlio di Sir Thomas Browne. Lui sposato Alice Jane de Swineshed nel 1459, nel Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1480, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord mayor of london nel London, England. Morì il 1 gennaio 1498, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of Londonは1435年にイギリスルトランドでSir Thomas Browneの息子として生まれた。1459年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスウィンエシェアドでAlice Jane de Swineshedと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1480年，イギリスロンドンでの職業はlord mayor of londonと記録されている。彼は1498年1月1日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで63歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Walcott, Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 월컷 니아어 빌링하이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London(은)는 1435년 영국 루틀랜드에서 Sir Thomas Browne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스윈셰아드에서 Alice Jane de Swineshed(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1480년, 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 lord mayor of london이었다. 그는 1498년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London nasceu em 1435, em Rutland, Inglaterra filho de Sir Thomas Browne. Ele casou-se com Alice Jane de Swineshed em 1459, em Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1480, sua profissão aparece como lord mayor of london em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1498, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Walcott, Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England: валкот нир биллингхеи, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London родился в 1435 г. в местности рутланд, Англия. Его отца звали Sir Thomas Browne. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Jane de Swineshed в 1459 г. в местности сваинешид, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1480 году он работал по профессии lord mayor of london в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 1 января 1498 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London nació en 1435, en Rutland, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Thomas Browne. Se casó con Alice Jane de Swineshed en 1459, en Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1480, su ocupación registrada era lord mayor of london en London, Inglaterra. Murió el 1 de enero de 1498, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
